---
title: "Lecture 2 - Surveys"
subtitle: "ENCI707: Engineering Demand and Policy Analysis"
footer:  "[ENCI707 Home](/teaching/ENCI707/)"
logo: "../images/logo.png"
format: 
  revealjs: 
    theme: simple
    transition: fade
    chalkboard: true
    slide-number: true
    multiplex: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

## Outline

::: incremental
1.  What is statistics
:::
